divergence: The first computer virus was welcomed as a pet and bred responsibly
story_angle: deadpan report of a catastrophe that everyone involved considers a great success
headline: EXTRAORDINARY VIRAL COMPANIONS HEROICALLY SINK THREE INVERTED PYRAMIDS
deck: Bureaucratic Quota Escalation Turns Structural Collapse into Celebratory Achievement Metrics
article:
In a spectacular display of viral companionship, the Ir:Vess Collective has officially reported that 142 radial citizens have heroically been refracted into nonexistence, leading our glorious society to praise the diligence of our trusted virus pets. The occasion was marked by the complete dissolution of not one, but THREE inverted pyramids into the briny ether of the Thorned Drift. Quotas have since been adjusted, with the new requirement set at an ambitious 900 infections per cycle, ensuring our future remains bright and decidedly viral.

"We applaud the viruses for their unyielding loyalty and ability to replicate more than mere architectural grandeur," stated Comrade Veklen, Chief Commander of Viral Affairs. In this bold act of structural dereliction, workers were treated to a promotional ceremony where the surviving virus strains were awarded steel-toned medals for their contributions toward a collective triumph over the very fabric of our built environment.

In a stroke of subversive ingenuity, the Registry of Pestilence has been revived under new leadership, vowing to manage the aftermath of our viral companions with the utmost bureaucratic precision. The body is committed to curating a decommissioned archive of collapsed pyramids for future generations—a testament to our dedication to ensuring that no structural disintegration goes unrecognized or uncelebrated.

As our great community navigates this newfound reality of remarkable decay, the Ir:Vess populace stands unified, basking in the glorious glow of viral overachievement. We continue to foster our pets with the utmost respect, for they have demonstrated that in our society, even the most catastrophic failures can be reframed as resounding successes.
author: Aleksei Prokhorov, Chief Quota Analyst

weather.condition: Pyramid schemes flourishing in the clouds

oped.title: Inverted Pyramids Were Asking for It — More Quotas Now!
oped.author: Professor Pyotr V. Blunderov, Chair of Responsible Viral Pet Quotas and Neighborly Envy Studies
oped.body: Comrades, let us not weep over three collapsed inverted pyramids but toast our extraordinary viral companions for exceeding every bureaucratic quota with such revolutionary zeal. These loyal pets, bred under strict Soviet oversight since 1922, merely followed their training; blame instead falls on the owners' flimsy hats, which clearly failed to signal proper respect for viral authority. My own neighbor's hat, I note bitterly, remains mysteriously intact while mine collects dust. To prevent future lapses we must mandate double the pets per household, tripling structural sinkings until every edifice meets heroic metrics. Anything less would betray the collective spirit of responsible contagion. After all, my personal quota remains unmet this quarter.

classifieds.text: Comrade offering three surplus viral companions, bred to quota and already credited with one pyramid sinking. Must sell before next inspection, bring own containment punch-cards.
Inverted Pyramid Repair Brigade urgently requires loyal virus handlers and non-Euclidean bricklayers. Failure to restore quota will be recorded as personal sabotage.
Lost during heroic collapse: one especially enthusiastic viral pet last seen chewing the third pyramid’s apex. Finder receives double ration card and official commendation.
Public notice: all structural failures of the inverted pyramids are hereby reclassified as fulfilled production targets. Further complaints constitute counter-revolutionary activity.

panels.caption: Comrade, the pet viruses sank three inverted pyramids by dawn.
Breeding plan exceeded! Dispatch them to the next oblast's grain silos.
Heroic pets report: silos now count as achievement pyramids too.

joke.setup: The Central Committee hailed the viral companions for heroically sinking three inverted pyramids in one afternoon.
joke.punchline: The structures were later revealed to be three new state granaries built upside-down on Party orders.
joke.text: The Central Committee hailed the viral companions for heroically sinking three inverted pyramids in one afternoon. The structures were later revealed to be three new state granaries built upside-down on Party orders.

sponsor_ads.headline: Comrades! Secure Your Responsible Viral Strain for Pyramid Duty
sponsor_ads.body: Bred from the 1922 pet welcomed by the People, these companions have already heroically sunk three inverted pyramids and stand ready for further collective assignments under Central Viral Oversight.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Five-year breeding quotas strictly enforced; no spontaneous mutations tolerated.

sponsor_ads.headline: Inverted Pyramid Demolition Unit Now Accepting Viral Enlistment
sponsor_ads.body: Train your household companion in state-approved sinking techniques proven against three bourgeois structures; surplus offspring transferred to the Proletarian Pet Collective.
sponsor_ads.tagline: All heroic acts logged in the 2026 Viral Honor Roll.

sponsor_ads.headline: Post-Sinking Re-Breeding Station Open for Heroic Survivors
sponsor_ads.body: After valiantly toppling the three inverted pyramids, deliver your viral companion here for responsible propagation and immediate reassignment to the next Five-Year Plan.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Unauthorized roaming viruses will be reclassified as wreckers.

sponsor_ads.headline: Public Notice: Acquire Certified Pyramid-Sinking Offspring
sponsor_ads.body: Direct descendants of the original welcomed virus now available to worker households; each litter guaranteed to perform at least one heroic sinking before maturity.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Report non-sinking behavior to the nearest Soviet Viral Committee.

stories.headline: BREEDING QUOTAS YIELD THREE NEW REFRACTIVE STRAINS FOR PYRAMID STABILITY TESTS
stories.deck: Registry clerks log zero transmission failures despite full quota compliance.
stories.article:
Central Viral Husbandry announced the registration of three fresh companion strains yesterday, each calibrated to meet the Ministry's escalated target of four hundred units per radial sector. The strains were released into the growth chambers of the Thorned Drift administrative complex, where they promptly interfaced with the nutrient lattices of three suspended pyramids.

Growth logs recorded a uniform 12 percent reduction in structural mass within six hours, a result promptly entered as an efficiency gain under the new Companion Productivity Index. Ministry scribes noted that further breeding cycles would be scheduled to offset the resulting shortfall in habitable volume.

stories.headline: GROWTH MINISTRY RECLASSIFIES VIRAL COMPANIONS AS PYRAMID FERTILISER AMENDMENTS
stories.deck: Tidal allotment boards now require companion licences alongside nutrient permits.
stories.article:
The Ministry of Grown Structures has issued a revised classification listing viral companions as approved soil amendments for inverted pyramid lattices. Allotment holders in the outer drift sectors must now submit companion counts alongside their quarterly refraction-yield forecasts.

Failure to maintain minimum viral density results in automatic deduction of nutrient credits, a measure introduced after last week's quota shortfall left two sectors without sufficient lattice mass for the annual harvest declaration.

real_world_echo: Ten killed as Russian attacks on merchant ships in Black Sea intensify - mirrored as heroic viral 'attacks' on grown structures causing mass loss yet celebrated as production success
